name: LiveGolf Studios at Thousand Oaks Golf Club
address: 4100 Thousand Oaks Dr NE, Grand Rapids, MI 49525
about: LiveGolf Studios at Thousand Oaks Golf Club offers an indoor golf simulation experience with a full bar and food service from the adjacent Reds restaurant. The facility features four TrackMan 4 simulators located in the Academy building, providing access to over 100 virtual golf courses and various practice modes. Pricing varies by day and time, with weekday afternoon rates starting at $45 per hour, peak times at $65 per hour, and several bundled packages and discounts available for families, seniors, and various time slots. The venue is suitable for casual play, group outings, and corporate events.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan 4 technology with radar and camera tracking for accurate data
Year-round golf in a climate-controlled environment regardless of weather conditions
Comprehensive food and drink service from Reds restaurant with full menu available
Variety of game options including virtual courses, challenges, and kid-friendly activities

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available from Reds restaurant, including appetizers and meals
Full bar service available, including beer, cocktails, wine, and spirits

simulator_hardware.notes: Four TrackMan 4 simulators with radar and camera tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own clubs to use on the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full menu from Reds restaurant with food and beverages available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on simulator availability and pace of play, but typical sessions run from 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and course selection.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly with $5 off per child per hour, kid-friendly games including mini golf and bullseye challenges, and family-friendly atmosphere.
